name: The Rush Funplex
address: 309 NE Englewood Rd, Kansas City, MO 64118
about: The Rush Funplex is an indoor entertainment venue in Kansas City, MO, offering a wide variety of attractions including an indoor golf course. It provides a weather-proof environment for families and groups to enjoy activities such as go-karts, laser tag, rock climbing, bumper cars, and arcade games. The venue operates on a full-access pass system, where individual attractions are not rented separately, and caters to parties, events, and casual daily visits with a focus on family-friendly fun and group entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor golf course is accessible in any weather condition
Part of a larger venue with diverse activities for a full day of entertainment
Full-access pass system allows for a mix of golf and other attractions
Kid-friendly amenities like Kiddie Karts and foam pit available

food_and_drink.notes: Food and drinks are available on-site but outside food and drinks are not permitted.
No mention of alcohol service on the website.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental policies. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for details on equipment availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers its own food and drinks on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes of golf?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the time required for an 18-hole round. Contact the venue for more details on play duration.

faq.question: Is this place kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Rush Funplex is highly kid-friendly, featuring attractions like Kiddie Karts, a foam pit, and other activities suitable for younger guests.
